segments.text: But the past is destiny and the future
is free will. Regret based on your past
actions is assuming that you would have
taken a different step. But the point is
you wouldn't have done anything
differently. You're even questioning a
past decision right now sitting in this
current moment because you've lived a
lot of life and experiences since then
to now. And those experiences have given
you a certain level of understanding an
increased level of understanding and
wisdom about life which has resulted in
you even questioning something that you
did in the past. The core idea being
that you wouldn't have done anything
differently. So you can stop wasting
your precious energy hoping and wishing
that you did something different and
actually use that energy to plan your
future.
[Music]
